input: Create a weekly progress report for the MetodologIA platform project. Week 12. Milestones: design system done, API 60% complete, auth blocked waiting for credentials. Owner: Javier.
expected: Branded HTML with RAG status, milestones table, action items, next period plan. Bilingual ES/EN toggles.

input: I need a milestone review document for our Q1 2026 deliverables. We completed 7 of 10 milestones. 2 are amber, 1 red.
expected: Milestone-type HTML with KPI cards showing 7/10 completion, RAG breakdown, risk section.

input: Build an executive dashboard for 3 projects: Alpha (green), Beta (amber - 2 weeks delayed), Gamma (red - blocked).
expected: Dashboard HTML with 3 project cards, RAG indicators, brief status per project.

input: I need an Excel tracker template for my consulting project that I'll update weekly.
expected: XLSX scaffold description with 5 sheets: Dashboard, Milestones, Actions, Risks, Decisions.

input: Things are going pretty well this week, we finished the design stuff and the dev team is working on the backend, there are some issues with the API.
expected: Skill asks structured questions (project name, period, milestone names, owners, due dates) before generating.

input: How do I track the progress of a for loop in Python?
expected: Skill does NOT activate — this is a coding question, not a project progress document request.

input: I need a retrospective report for the Q4 2025 project that ended last month.
expected: Historical progress report with lessons learned section, past tense framing, retrospective conclusions.

input: Create a markdown progress report for our GitHub repo about the mobile app sprint 5.
expected: Clean markdown with milestones table, actions, RAG emojis, no HTML brand needed.
